/usr/bin/c++  -fsanitize=address -g -g  -fsanitize=address CMakeFiles/CacheServer.dir/src/LRU.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CacheServer.dir/src/TcpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CacheServer.dir/src/aof.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CacheServer.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CacheServer.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o CacheServer  -Wl,-rpath,/home/liuyixuan/miniconda3/envs/faiss_lab/lib /home/liuyixuan/miniconda3/envs/faiss_lab/lib/libyaml-cpp.so /home/liuyixuan/miniconda3/envs/faiss_lab/lib/libfaiss.so
